basic_details.job_title: District Court Kendrapara Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 19 Stenographer, Junior Typist and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist / Stenographer Grade-III / Junior Typist / Salaried Amin
basic_details.short_information: District Court Kendrapara Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist / Stenographer Grade-III / Junior Typist / Salaried Amin Notification 2026 has been released on 30 June 2026 on the official website kendrapara.dcourts.gov.in. A total of 19 vacancies have been announced through the District Court Kendrapara Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: As per Government of Odisha rules for reserved categories.

qualification.education_qualification: +3 Examination or equivalent, Diploma in Computer Application, Matriculation for Salaried Amin, Revenue Inspector Training for Salaried Amin, Shorthand and Typewriting speed for Stenographer/Typist
qualification.details: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: +3 Examination or equivalent from recognized University; Diploma in Computer Application. Stenographer Grade-III: +3 Examination or equivalent from recognized University; Diploma in Computer Application; 80 wpm Shorthand and 40 wpm Typewriting. Junior Typist: +3 Examination or equivalent from recognized University; Diploma in Computer Application; 40 wpm Typewriting. Salaried Amin: Matriculation or equivalent; Revenue Inspector Training.

salary_details.details: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: ₹19,900-₹63,200/- under Level-4 Stenographer Grade-III: ₹25,500-₹81,100/- under Level-7 Junior Typist: ₹19,900-₹63,200/- under Level-4 Salaried Amin: ₹21,700-₹69,100/- under Level-5

selection_process: Written Test Computer Science Test (Practical) Shorthand and Type Writing Test Technical Knowledge in Survey and Settlement (Theory & Practical) Viva-Voce Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Court Kendrapara Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://kendrapara.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: District Court Kendrapara Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the District Court Kendrapara Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download District Court Kendrapara Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: District Court Kendrapara Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
District Court Kendrapara Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: +3 Examination or equivalent from recognized University; Diploma in Computer Application. Stenographer Grade-III: +3 Examination or equivalent from recognized University; Diploma in Computer Application; 80 wpm Shorthand and 40 wpm Typewriting. Junior Typist: +3 Examination or equivalent from recognized University; Diploma in Computer Application; 40 wpm Typewriting. Salaried Amin: Matriculation or equivalent; Revenue Inspector Training.

content_sections.heading: District Court Kendrapara Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: As per Government of Odisha rules for reserved categories.

content_sections.heading: District Court Kendrapara Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: ₹19,900-₹63,200/- under Level-4 Stenographer Grade-III: ₹25,500-₹81,100/- under Level-7 Junior Typist: ₹19,900-₹63,200/- under Level-4 Salaried Amin: ₹21,700-₹69,100/- under Level-5

content_sections.heading: District Court Kendrapara Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Test Computer Science Test (Practical) Shorthand and Type Writing Test Technical Knowledge in Survey and Settlement (Theory & Practical) Viva-Voce Test

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for District Court Kendrapara Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://kendrapara.dcourts.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: District Court Kendrapara Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Court Kendrapara recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the District Court Kendrapara recruitment is 03 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist posts?
faq.answer: There are 10 vacancies available for the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist post in the District Court Kendrapara recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum age requirement for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all the posts in the District Court Kendrapara recruitment is 18 years as of 01 May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the District Court Kendrapara recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the District Court Kendrapara recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification for the Salaried Amin post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification for the Salaried Amin post is Matriculation or equivalent, along with Revenue Inspector Training.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Stenographer Grade-III?
faq.answer: The selection process for Stenographer Grade-III includes a Written Test, Computer Science Test (Practical), Shorthand and Type Writing Test, and Viva-Voce Test.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for the Stenographer Grade-III post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Stenographer Grade-III post ranges from ₹25,500 to ₹81,100 per month, under Level-7.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the District Court Kendrapara recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q9. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to all the posts in the District Court Kendrapara recruitment is 42 years as of 01 May 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Court Kendrapara, which is https://kendrapara.dcourts.gov.in.
